job_summary: A Clinical Trial Manager (CTM) oversees the execution of one or more clinical trials, ensuring they are completed on time, within budget, and in compliance with regulations.
key_responsibilities: Develop study timelines, budgets, and monitoring plans
Ensure compliance with Good Clinical Practice
Track trial progress, risks, and deliverables
Coordinate with cross-functional teams (data, regulatory, safety)
qualifications: Degree in Life Sciences / Pharmacy / Nursing
career_path: CTM → Clinical Project Manager → Program Manager
skills_required: coordinate with cross-functional teams (data, regulatory, safety)
develop study timelines, budgets, and monitoring plans
track trial progress, risks, and deliverables
